mapper.select: SELECT ee.environment_event_id AS environmentEventId, ee.equipment_id AS equipmentId, e.equipment_code AS equipmentCode, e.equipment_name AS equipmentName, ee.env_temperature AS envTemperature, ee.env_humidity AS envHumidity, ee.env_particle_cnt AS envParticleCnt, ee.env_deviation_type AS envDeviationType, ee.env_correction_applied AS envCorrectionApplied, ee.env_detected_at AS envDetectedAt FROM environment_event ee INNER JOIN equipment e ON ee.equipment_id = e.equipment_id WHERE ee.environment_event_id = #{environmentEventId}

SELECT ee.environment_event_id AS environmentEventId, ee.equipment_id AS equipmentId, e.equipment_code AS equipmentCode, e.equipment_name AS equipmentName, ee.env_temperature AS envTemperature, ee.env_humidity AS envHumidity, ee.env_particle_cnt AS envParticleCnt, ee.env_deviation_type AS envDeviationType, ee.env_correction_applied AS envCorrectionApplied, ee.env_detected_at AS envDetectedAt FROM environment_event ee INNER JOIN equipment e ON ee.equipment_id = e.equipment_id WHERE ee.equipment_id = #{equipmentId} ORDER BY ee.env_detected_at DESC, ee.environment_event_id DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT ee.environment_event_id AS environmentEventId, ee.equipment_id AS equipmentId, e.equipment_code AS equipmentCode, e.equipment_name AS equipmentName, ee.env_temperature AS envTemperature, ee.env_humidity AS envHumidity, ee.env_particle_cnt AS envParticleCnt, ee.env_deviation_type AS envDeviationType, ee.env_correction_applied AS envCorrectionApplied, ee.env_detected_at AS envDetectedAt FROM environment_event ee INNER JOIN equipment e ON ee.equipment_id = e.equipment_id WHERE ee.equipment_id = #{equipmentId} AND ee.env_detected_at <= #{referenceTime} ORDER BY ee.env_detected_at DESC, ee.environment_event_id DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT ee.environment_event_id AS environmentEventId, ee.equipment_id AS equipmentId, e.equipment_code AS equipmentCode, e.equipment_name AS equipmentName, ee.env_temperature AS envTemperature, ee.env_humidity AS envHumidity, ee.env_particle_cnt AS envParticleCnt, ee.env_deviation_type AS envDeviationType, ee.env_correction_applied AS envCorrectionApplied, ee.env_detected_at AS envDetectedAt FROM environment_event ee INNER JOIN equipment e ON ee.equipment_id = e.equipment_id WHERE ee.equipment_id = #{equipmentId} AND ee.env_detected_at >= #{referenceTime} ORDER BY ee.env_detected_at ASC, ee.environment_event_id ASC LIMIT 1

SELECT ee.environment_event_id AS environmentEventId, ee.equipment_id AS equipmentId, e.equipment_code AS equipmentCode, e.equipment_name AS equipmentName, ee.env_temperature AS envTemperature, ee.env_humidity AS envHumidity, ee.env_particle_cnt AS envParticleCnt, ee.env_deviation_type AS envDeviationType, ee.env_correction_applied AS envCorrectionApplied, ee.env_detected_at AS envDetectedAt FROM environment_event ee INNER JOIN equipment e ON ee.equipment_id = e.equipment_id WHERE ee.env_correction_applied = false ORDER BY ee.env_detected_at DESC, ee.environment_event_id DESC
